flavorText: Lore Bards gather secrets from every tradition and weaponize words with biting precision.

features.description: Gain proficiency in three skills of your choice.
When a creature you can see within 60 feet makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll, you can use your reaction to expend a Bardic Inspiration die and subtract the die from that roll.
Learn two spells of your choice from any class spell list.
When you make an ability check, you can expend a Bardic Inspiration die and add the roll to your check.

lore-bonus-proficiencies.name: Bonus Proficiencies
lore-bonus-proficiencies.summary: This subclass grants extra training so your sheet reflects a broader skill, tool, or weapon identity than the base class alone.
lore-bonus-proficiencies.description:
Gain proficiency in three skills of your choice.

Bonus Proficiencies is not glamorous on its own, but it changes what the character can reliably contribute. The important thing is surfacing the added proficiencies clearly so they affect real rolls.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.

lore-cutting-words.name: Cutting Words
lore-cutting-words.summary: Spend inspiration as a reaction to spoil an enemy’s key roll at exactly the right time.
lore-cutting-words.description:
When a creature you can see within 60 feet makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll, you can use your reaction to expend a Bardic Inspiration die and subtract the die from that roll.

Cutting Words is one of the strongest support reactions a bard gets. The sheet should make it obvious that this can swing attacks, checks, and other contested moments before it is too late.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.
lore-cutting-words.trigger: When a creature you can see within 60 feet makes an attack roll

lore-magical-discoveries.name: Magical Discoveries
lore-magical-discoveries.summary: Your college widens the bard spell list with carefully stolen or studied off-list magic.
lore-magical-discoveries.description:
Learn two spells of your choice from any class spell list.

Magical Discoveries should point the player toward real spell selection impact, because it changes the kinds of problems your bard can solve for the whole party.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.

lore-peerless-skill.name: Peerless Skill
lore-peerless-skill.summary: You can spend inspiration on yourself when a crucial skill check absolutely must land.
lore-peerless-skill.description:
When you make an ability check, you can expend a Bardic Inspiration die and add the roll to your check.

Peerless Skill is the Lore bard’s statement that expertise scenes belong to them. It should feel visible any time the table reaches for a decisive social, knowledge, or infiltration roll.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.
lore-peerless-skill.trigger: When you make an ability check
